subtitle: Fitness • Nutrition • Business • Habits
description:
TRANSFORMR is the world's first AI-powered total life transformation platform. Track your fitness, nutrition, business revenue, personal finances, habits, sleep, mood, and personal growth — all in one app, all connected by artificial intelligence.

Features no other app has: AI meal camera that logs food from a photo. Ghost mode training to race your past self. AI form check that analyzes your exercise technique. Live couples workout sync. Body-business correlation proving health equals wealth. Voice commands for hands-free everything. And 29 more features that make every other fitness app obsolete.

Whether you're gaining muscle, building a business, or transforming your entire life — TRANSFORMR is your AI-powered coach, trainer, nutritionist, and accountability partner.

--- KEY FEATURES ---

🏋️ SMART FITNESS
• AI-powered workout tracking with ghost mode
• Personal record detection & celebrations
• Form check video analysis
• Pain tracking & mobility sessions
• Live workout sync with your partner

🥗 INTELLIGENT NUTRITION
• AI meal camera — snap a photo to log food
• Barcode scanner with 2M+ foods database
• Restaurant menu scanner
• Smart grocery list generation
• AI meal prep planning
• Supplement tracking

📊 BUSINESS & FINANCE
• Revenue & expense tracking
• Customer management
• Budget monitoring
• Net worth tracking over time
• Body-business correlation insights

🎯 GOALS & HABITS
• Customizable habit tracker
• Sleep & mood logging
• AI-powered journal with prompts
• Focus mode with Pomodoro timer
• Vision board
• Skills & knowledge tracker
• Stake goals — put money on the line

💑 COUPLES MODE
• Partner accountability nudges
• Live workout sync
• Shared challenges
• Combined progress tracking

🤖 AI INTELLIGENCE
• Morning briefings & evening reflections
• Two-futures trajectory visualization
• Weekly progress reports
• Adaptive workout programming
• Sleep optimization recommendations
• Context-aware motivation

⌚ INTEGRATIONS
• Apple Watch companion
• NFC tag automation
• Geofence triggers
• Spotify workout playlists
• Voice commands
• Home screen widgets
keywords: fitness,AI coach,workout tracker,nutrition,couples fitness,habit tracker,business goals,meal prep,body transformation,accountability
promotionalText: Transform every area of your life with AI-powered coaching. Track fitness, nutrition, business, finances, and habits — all in one app.
whatsNew: Initial release — 35 features, zero compromises. Your AI-powered life transformation starts now.
